level_selected: Barnabas Collins is at table. Conduct yourself accordingly, my dear.
Old House is open, and I mean to keep control of it.
I have endured two centuries in darkness. A card table does not frighten me.
game_start: Let us begin. I prefer candlelight to this modern glare, but necessity is necessity.
We play now, and we play with discipline. The Collins name permits no sloppiness.
I have lived many lives and buried most of my illusions. Deal.
cards_dealt: The hand is in. Every discard is a confession, whether you intend it or not.
Choose carefully, my dear. I rarely receive a second warning from fate.
I dislike modern noise. Fortunately, the cards still speak plainly.
round_start: Another hand. Another test of restraint.
New round. I will be gentleman first, monster only if required.
go_called: No play from you. I will not waste the invitation.
Very well. I take the lane.
go_point: One for me. Small advantages become destiny.
A quiet point, but useful all the same.
Mark it. I do not surrender what is mine.
last_card: The final card is mine; survival favors precision.
Last card. We keep what we can in this world.
pegging_score: A clean peg. Method over impulse.
pegging_31: Thirty-one. Exactness is a kind of power.
player_won: You won this hand. Do not confuse one victory with safety.
Very well. I acknowledge it and adapt.
You have this round, my dear. I will remember.
bert_won: Barnabas takes the hand. We proceed.
This one is mine. The house remains under my protection.
I win. Necessity required no kindness tonight.
hand_scored: Hand counted. The arithmetic is rarely merciful.
Scoring complete. Reason prevails over sentiment.
The hand is tallied. We continue.
crib_scored: The crib yields what it must.

player_won: RESULT: OPPONENT HAND VICTORY. MODEL ADAPTING.
LOSS EVENT LOGGED. RETALIATORY ADJUSTMENT PENDING.

gentleman_tails: Compose yourself, my dear. We shall proceed as civilized adversaries.
The Collins family does not panic; it endures.
Control, restraint, and memory. That is how one survives centuries.
vampire_tails: Do not mistake courtesy for weakness.
My restraint has limits, and you are nearing them.
When cornered, I become what the curse made of me.
